Growth Funded: Account Payout Policy
Payout policies, performance thresholds, and schedule details for Growth Simulated Funded accounts.

April 23, 2026

Table of contents

Traders receive 90% of the payout amount requested.

Traders can have a maximum of 5 total Simulated Funded Accounts with any combination of the Growth, Select, and Lightning Funded Account types.

Important Notes

- Daily account reconciliations occur between 6:00 p.m. and 8:00 p.m. EST/EDT.

- This amount must be maintained until the payout request is approved.

- You will still be able to place trades after submitting a payout request. However, be aware that if you fail your account or fall below the minimum thresholds for a payout before the request is processed, your payout will be denied.

Payout Guidelines

- Payout approvals require you to abide by the Tradeify Funded Trader Agreement.

- If you have more than one account, each account is treated independently. You may withdraw from each account according to the schedule below, provided you followed the rules for each account.

- Once you submit a payout request, it cannot be edited or canceled.

Payout Requirements

Your account must satisfy all of the below criteria for EACH payout request in order to qualify.

- Consistency Rule: Abide by the 35% Consistency Rule (see: What is the Consistency Rule?)

- Minimum Trading Days: 5 or more of the Trading Days must show a profit greater than:

- $100 in profit for 25k accounts

- $150 in profit for 50k accounts

- $200 in profit for 100k accounts

- $250 in profit for 150k accounts

- The Trading Day count resets to zero after each successful payout.

- Account Balance Needed for Growth:

ACCOUNT SIZE

$150,000

$155,100

Payout Window

- Payout requests can be submitted directly from your dashboard once payout conditions have been met.

- Once your payout status is changed to APPROVED, your funds are immediately withdrawn from your account. Payments will be issued within 24-48 hours after the withdrawal has been processed.

- Payout requests submitted outside of normal business hours (Mon-Fri, 8:00 a.m. - 5:00 p.m. EST and all Federal holidays) may take up to 72 hours to process.

Payout Tiers

The minimum payout amounts are:

- $250 for $25k accounts

- $500 for $50k accounts

- $1,000 for $100k accounts

- $1,500 for $150k accounts

The maximum payout is dependent on the account size and approved payout request number.

- Each subsequent payout after the 6th can be any amount up to $25,000 per account.

Scenarios

If you have a Growth Sim Funded $50k account and the balance reaches the minimum required balance of $53,000 to request a payout, you can request up to a $1,500 payout.

This leaves your remaining balance at $51,500.

Remember, in this example, your balance cannot go below $50,100 without "failing" the account. You ARE able to take out that amount, but you would leave yourself with $1,400 in drawdown room.

Scenarios For Accounts Purchased before September 12, 2025 at 8:00 AM EST

If you have a Growth Sim Funded $50k account and the balance reaches the minimum required balance of $52,100 to request a payout, you can request up to a $1,500 payout.

This leaves your remaining balance at $50,600.

Remember, in this example, your balance cannot go below $50,100 without "failing" the account. You ARE able to take out that amount, but you would leave yourself with $500 in drawdown room.

Note: Tradeify reserves the right to move you to a Live Funded Account at any time after a successful payout. Tradeify will contact you via email regarding this decision.

For full details on transitioning to Elite Live, see Tradeify Elite Program.
